message:
test(engine): comprehensive integration test suite — 110 new test files covering existing modules

Add broad integration test coverage exercising public APIs from outside
the crate boundary for existing engine modules. Each test file follows a
consistent pattern: helper factories, happy-path exercising of all public
types/methods/enum variants, error path coverage, serde round-trip
validation, Display/Debug impl checks, and cross-concern lifecycle
scenarios.

Coverage spans the full module surface including:
- Runtime decision theory, lanes, and execution orchestration
- Parser subsystem (dual-backend, api stability, conformance, evidence)
- Governance framework (scorecards, hooks, incentives, mechanisms)
- Security subsystem (conformance, e2e, policy-as-data)
- Benchmark infrastructure (e2e, denominators, constrained ambient lanes)
- Migration and compatibility (kit enrichment, module matrix, contracts)
- Observability (channel model, probe design, quality sentinel)
- Release gates (checklist, release, test262, cut-line automation)
- Evidence and replay subsystems (forensic, deterministic, causal)
- Trust economics and zone management
- Extension host lifecycle and authority guards

Also adds 2 test fixture files:
- parser_final_readiness_dossier_v1.json
- tail_latency_memory_hardening_regression_gate_v1.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
